summary: Iteration 21: Bug fixes and new features tested - All PASSED. Backend 100% (19/19 tests), Frontend 100% (all UI flows verified)

event_detail_panel_opens.description: Clicking event card opens EventDetailPanel with Guests/Staff tabs

event_guest_search.description: Searching 'John' in Pulse guests shows matching results in dropdown

add_guest_to_event.description: Clicking search result adds guest to event, shows 'Guest added' toast

guest_persists_in_pulse_after_removal.description: Guest data remains in Pulse after being removed from event

event_staff_tab.description: Staff tab shows 'Assign Staff' button and empty state

assign_staff_to_event.description: Staff assignment with role and hourly_rate works correctly

create_event_wizard_step_1.description: Step 1 has event name, cover ($), cover+consumption ($) fields

create_event_wizard_step_2.description: Step 2 shows staff select dropdown, role input, $/hr input, + button

create_event_with_staff.description: Creating event then assigning staff works correctly

pulse_guests_search_api.description: Returns matching guests by name with enriched data (visits, spend_total, tags)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all bug fixes and new features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 features all working: Tap search accepts tab number with/without # prefix and by guest name. Event Detail Panel has Guests and Staff tabs. Guests tab has Pulse search with add/remove. Staff tab has assign with role+hourly_rate and remove. Create Event Wizard has 2 steps (event info, staff assignment). End Event clears event_guests temporal presence while preserving guest data in Pulse. All backend CRUD endpoints verified with pytest.
